think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify and segment all scrimmage plays from the provided video of an NFL game between the Green Bay Packers and the San Francisco 49ers.

**1. Analyze the Request:**
- **Task:** Find every scrimmage play.
- **Start Time:** When the offensive formation is visibly set and all pre-snap motion has stopped.
- **End Time:** When play action visibly stops (ball carrier motionless, ball out of bounds, catch, score).
- **Output Format:** JSON with specific fields for each segment.

**2. Scan the Video for Scrimmage Plays:**

*   **Play 1:**
    *   **Start:** 00:20 - Packers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 00:36 - Aaron Jones is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 1st & 10, Packers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 3 yards.

*   **Play 2:**
    *   **Start:** 00:41 - Packers line up for 2nd & 7.
    *   **End:** 00:50 - Jayden Reed is tackled immediately after the handoff.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 2nd & 7, Packers 28-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play (jet sweep). Loss of yards.

*   **Play 3:**
    *   **Start:** 01:04 - Packers line up for 2nd & 10.
    *   **End:** 01:16 - Aaron Jones is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 2nd & 10, Packers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 4 yards.

*   **Play 4:**
    *   **Start:** 01:31 - Packers line up for 3rd & 6.
    *   **End:** 01:56 - Romeo Doubs catches the ball and runs out of bounds.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 3rd & 6, Packers 29-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 37 yards.

*   **Play 5:**
    *   **Start:** 02:25 - Packers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 02:37 - Jordan Love throws the ball away/grounded.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 39-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play (incomplete/penalty).

*   **Play 6:**
    *   **Start:** 03:26 - Packers line up for 1st & 15.
    *   **End:** 03:41 - Aaron Jones is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 1st & 15, 49ers 40-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 4 yards.

*   **Play 7:**
    *   **Start:** 04:13 - Packers line up for 2nd & 11.
    *   **End:** 04:26 - Tucker Kraft catches the ball and is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 2nd & 11, 49ers 36-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 11 yards.

*   **Play 8:**
    *   **Start:** 05:01 - Packers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 05:17 - Jordan Love throws incomplete.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Incomplete.

*   **Play 9:**
    *   **Start:** 05:47 - Packers line up for 2nd & 10.
    *   **End:** 06:03 - Aaron Jones is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 2nd & 10, 49ers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 11 yards.

*   **Play 10:**
    *   **Start:** 06:27 - Packers line up for 3rd & 1.
    *   **End:** 06:42 - Jordan Love throws incomplete.
    *   **Details:** 1st Quarter, 3rd & 1, 49ers 14-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Incomplete.

*   **Play 11:**
    *   **Start:** 07:09 - Packers line up for 3rd & 1 (start of 2nd quarter).
    *   **End:** 07:30 - Aaron Jones is tackled short of the first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 1, 49ers 14-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Loss of yards.

*   **Play 12:**
    *   **Start:** 07:40 - Packers line up for 4th & 1.
    *   **End:** 08:10 - Jordan Love is tackled short of the first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 4th & 1, 49ers 13-yard line. Under center formation. Run play (QB sneak). Loss of yards.

*   **Play 13:**
    *   **Start:** 09:20 - 49ers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 09:35 - George Kittle catches the ball and is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 13-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 9 yards.

*   **Play 14:**
    *   **Start:** 10:01 - 49ers line up for 2nd & 1.
    *   **End:** 10:16 - Christian McCaffrey is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 1, 49ers 22-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 0 yards.

*   **Play 15:**
    *   **Start:** 10:42 - 49ers line up for 3rd & 1.
    *   **End:** 10:54 - Brock Purdy sneaks for the first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 1, 49ers 22-yard line. Under center formation. Run play. Gain of 1 yard.

*   **Play 16:**
    *   **Start:** 11:18 - 49ers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 11:32 - Christian McCaffrey is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 23-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 2 yards.

*   **Play 17:**
    *   **Start:** 11:58 - 49ers line up for 2nd & 8.
    *   **End:** 12:13 - Christian McCaffrey is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 8, 49ers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 4 yards.

*   **Play 18:**
    *   **Start:** 12:45 - 49ers line up for 3rd & 1.
    *   **End:** 12:57 - Christian McCaffrey is tackled for a first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 1, 49ers 29-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 1 yard.

*   **Play 19:**
    *   **Start:** 13:26 - 49ers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 13:36 - Brock Purdy throws incomplete.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 30-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Incomplete.

*   **Play 20:**
    *   **Start:** 14:07 - 49ers line up for 2nd & 10.
    *   **End:** 14:23 - Brock Purdy throws to Jalen Hurd for a first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 10, 49ers 30-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 10 yards.

*   **Play 21:**
    *   **Start:** 14:48 - 49ers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 15:03 - Brock Purdy throws to Brandon Aiyuk for a first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 40-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 10 yards.

*   **Play 22:**
    *   **Start:** 15:34 - 49ers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 15:48 - Brock Purdy throws incomplete.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, 49ers 49-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Incomplete.

*   **Play 23:**
    *   **Start:** 16:23 - 49ers line up for 2nd & 10.
    *   **End:** 16:34 - Christian McCaffrey is tackled.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 2nd & 10, 49ers 49-yard line. Shotgun formation. Run play. Gain of 4 yards.

*   **Play 24:**
    *   **Start:** 17:07 - 49ers line up for 3rd & 5.
    *   **End:** 17:22 - Brock Purdy throws a touchdown pass to George Kittle.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 3rd & 5, 49ers 32-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Touchdown.

*   **Play 25:**
    *   **Start:** 19:13 - Packers line up for 1st & 10.
    *   **End:** 19:31 - Jordan Love throws to Jayden Reed for a first down.
    *   **Details:** 2nd Quarter, 1st & 10, Packers 25-yard line. Shotgun formation. Pass play. Gain of 27 yards.

**3. Construct JSON Output:**
I will now format these observations into the requested JSON structure.

*   Play 1: 00:20 - 00:36
*   Play 2: 00:41 - 00:50
*   Play 3: 01:04 - 01:16
*   Play 4: 01:31 - 01:56
*   Play 5: 02:25 - 02:37
*   Play 6: 03:26 - 03:41
*   Play 7: 04:13 - 04:26
*   Play 8: 05:01 - 05:17
*   Play 9: 05:47 - 06:03
*   Play 10: 06:27 - 06:42
*   Play 11: 07:09 - 07:30
*   Play 12: 07:40 - 08:10
*   Play 13: 09:20 - 09:35
*   Play 14: 10:01 - 10:16
*   Play 15: 10:42 - 10:54
*   Play 16: 11:18 - 11:32
*   Play 17: 11:58 - 12:13
*   Play 18: 12:45 - 12:57
*   Play 19: 13:26 - 13:36
*   Play 20: 14:07 - 14:23
*   Play 21: 14:48 - 15:03
*   Play 22: 15:34 - 15:48
*   Play 23: 16:23 - 16:34
*   Play 24: 17:07 - 17:22
*   Play 25: 19:13 - 19:31

All timestamps are within the video duration. The segments cover all live scrimmage plays shown.

One detail to check: Play 5 ends with a penalty flag, but the play action stops when the ball hits the ground/is thrown away. The segment should end there.
Play 12 ends with the pile of players settling.
Play 24 ends with the touchdown celebration starting.

The timestamps look accurate based on the visual cues of formation setting and play conclusion.

One small correction on Play 12: The formation is under center for the QB sneak.
One small correction on Play 15: The formation is under center for the QB sneak.

I will proceed with generating the JSON.
